title: The Void World
description: A world of air that has nothing in it, great for sky builds or maps. Is designed for 1.21.4. Do not expect updates.
body:
The world of Void is deisgned for map makers and builders that wish to build sky/void projects. The world generates with nothing in it and can be built on to y -2000 to y 2000. (well, maybe a  bit more but I tested that). The world is set to look like the overworld sky wise. 

Please do not expect updates to this or at lest not ver often.
